# Tharun.Font v0.1.0 - Apply Custom Fonts with Ease

This package provides a DAX UDF function for applying **ANY custom font** to text in Power BI visualizations with zero friction. By leveraging embedded SVG with base64-encoded fonts, this function enables you to use proprietary, branded, or special fonts directly in your reports.

## 🎯 Key Advantages

✨ **Apply ANY Font Type**
- Use any WOFF font file
- No restrictions on font families or styles
- Perfect for brand compliance and custom typography

🚀 **Zero Installation Required**
- **For Developers:** No need to install fonts on your machine
- **For Report Users:** No need to install fonts on their machines
- Just encode the font file and embed it - that's it!

🎨 **No Custom Visuals Needed**
- Works with native Power BI text visuals
- No third-party custom visuals required
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

⚙️ **No Theme JSON Modifications**
- No need to modify theme files
- No complex theme configuration
- Works out-of-the-box with any Power BI theme

⚡ **Simple & Elegant Implementation**
- Just one DAX function call
- Pass your text, font data, font name, and alignment
- Instant custom font rendering in your reports

## Function Overview

### Tharun.Font.ApplyCustomFont
Generates an SVG data URI with embedded custom fonts for rendering text in Power BI visuals. Perfect for maintaining brand consistency by using proprietary fonts in dashboards and reports.

Checkout this article to understand how this function can be used: 
**[Apply custom fonts](https://www.techietips.co.in/articles/unlock-unlimited-fonts-in-power-bi-no-installs-no-custom-visuals-no-theme-changes)**
